rationale: A structure in Critical condition can never be buried below P2 by compensatory scores (AS 5100 / TfNSW practice).
Scour-critical structures (NBI Item 113) must surface regardless of customer/value scores.
Fracture-critical member present (AASHTO FCM): raise one band and force engineering review.
Sub-standard load rating (RF<1, CS 454 context) cannot sit below P3 unreviewed.
Inputs older than the inspection cycle are linearly down-weighted to a 0.5 floor (ISO 55013 data quality).
